files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.BosDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the Binary Device Object Store (BOS) descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.2 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.BosDevCapabilityDescriptor
files.Summary: A generic representation of a BOS Device Capability descriptor. It is advised to check bDevCapabilityType and call the matching libusb_get_*_descriptor function to get a structure fully matching the type.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.BosType
files.Summary: USB capability types

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Capability
files.Summary: Capabilities supported by an instance of libusb on the current running platform.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.ClassCode
files.Summary: Device and/or Interface Class codes

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.ConfigDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the standard USB configuration descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.3 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.ContainerIdDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the Container ID descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.2.3 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields, except UUIDs, are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Context
files.Summary: Represents a wrapper class for libusb_context handles.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.ControlSetup
files.Summary: Setup packet for control transfers.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.DescriptorType
files.Summary: Descriptor types as defined by the USB specification.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Descriptors.UsbDescriptor
files.Summary: Base class for all usb descriptors structures.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Device
files.Summary: Represents a wrapper class for libusb_device handles.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.DeviceDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the standard USB device descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.1 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.DeviceHandle
files.Summary: Represents a wrapper class for libusb_device_handle handles.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.EndpointDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the standard USB endpoint descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.6 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.EndpointDirection
files.Summary: Endpoint direction.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Error
files.Summary: libusb Error codes.

files.Summary: Hotplug callback function type.

files.Summary: Since version 1.0.16, Hotplug events

files.Summary: Since version 1.0.16, Flags for hotplug events

files.Summary: Value representing a combination of a and tree.

files.Summary: An ID for a physical USB port.

files.Summary: Base class for all Usb descriptors. , ,

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Info.UsbConfigInfo
files.Summary: Contains all Configuration information for the current .

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Info.UsbDeviceInfo
files.Summary: Contains USB device descriptor information.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Info.UsbEndpointInfo
files.Summary: Contains Endpoint information for the current .

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Info.UsbInterfaceInfo
files.Summary: Describes a USB device interface.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Interface
files.Summary: A collection of alternate settings for a particular USB interface.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.InterfaceDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the standard USB interface descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.5 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.IsoPacketDescriptor
files.Summary: Isochronous packet descriptor.

files.Summary: libusb_endpoint_descriptor.

files.Summary: Class used for asynchronously waiting for arrivals.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.ErrorExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for the enumeration.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.IUsbContext
files.Summary: Initializes a new libusb context. You can access most of libusb's functionality through context. Multiple contexts operate in isolation from each other.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.IUsbDevice
files.Summary: The interface contains members needed to configure a USB device for use.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.NativeLibraryVersion
files.Summary: Static class to determine the native libusb version.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UnixNativeTimeval
files.Summary: Unix mono.net timeval structure.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbContext
files.Summary: An instance of the libusb API. You can use multiple which are independent from each other.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbDevice
files.Summary: Represents a device which is managed by libusb. Use to get a list of devices which are available for use.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbDeviceCollection
files.Summary: A collection of objects. All devices in this collection are disposed of when youd dispose the collection.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbEndpointBase
files.Summary: Endpoint members common to Read, Write, Bulk, and Interrupt .

files.Summary: Contains methods for retrieving data from a or endpoint using the overloaded functions.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbEndpointTransferQueueReader
files.Summary: Represents a reader for USB endpoint transfers that uses a queue to manage multiple read operations.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbEndpointWriter
files.Summary: Contains methods for writing data to a or endpoint using the overloaded functions.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LibUsb.UsbException
files.Summary: Exceptions thrown from libusb s.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.LogLevel
files.Summary: Log message levels.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.EndpointType
files.Summary: All possible USB endpoint types.

files.Summary: General utilities class used by LudnLite and exposed publicly for your convience.

files.Summary: Used for allocating a to access the underlying pointer of an object.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.ReadEndpointID
files.Summary: Availabled endpoint numbers/ids for reading.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.SafeContextHandle
files.Summary: Base class for all critial handles.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbConstants
files.Summary: Various USB constants.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbCtrlFlags
files.Summary: For Convienience Endpoint direction, recipient of the request, and request type on one enumeration.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbDeviceFinder
files.Summary: Finds and identifies usb devices. Used for easily locating

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbRequestRecipient
files.Summary: Recipient of the request.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbRequestType
files.Summary: Standard USB requests.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbSetupPacket
files.Summary: Transfers data to the main control endpoint (Endpoint 0).

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.UsbStream
files.Summary: A stream which reads and writes of an USB connection.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Main.WriteEndpointID
files.Summary: Availabled endpoint numbers/ids for writing.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Pollfd
files.Summary: File descriptor for polling

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.PollfdAddedDelegate
files.Summary: Callback function, invoked when a new file descriptor should be added to the set of file descriptors monitored for events.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.PollfdRemovedDelegate
files.Summary: Callback function, invoked when a file descriptor should be removed from the set of file descriptors being monitored for events.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.RequestRecipient
files.Summary: transfers. Values 4 through 31 are reserved.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.RequestType
files.Summary: transfers.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Speed
files.Summary: Speed codes. Indicates the speed at which the device is operating.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.SsEndpointCompanionDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the superspeed endpoint companion descriptor. This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.7 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.SsUsbDeviceCapabilityAttributes
files.Summary: field of the SuperSpeed USB Device Capability descriptor.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.SsUsbDeviceCapabilityDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the SuperSpeed USB Device Capability descriptor This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.2.2 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.StandardRequest
files.Summary: Standard requests, as defined in table 9-5 of the USB 3.0 specifications

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.SupportedSpeed
files.Summary: Supported speeds (wSpeedSupported) bitfield.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Transfer
files.Summary: The generic USB transfer structure. The user populates this structure and then submits it in order to request a transfer. After the transfer has completed, the library populates the transfer with the results and passes it back to the user.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.TransferDelegate
files.Summary: Asynchronous transfer callback function type.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.TransferFlags
files.Summary: libusb_transfer.flags values

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.TransferStatus
files.Summary: Transfer status codes

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.TransferType
files.Summary: Transfer type.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Usb20ExtensionAttributes
files.Summary: of the USB 2.0 Extension descriptor.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Usb20ExtensionDescriptor
files.Summary: A structure representing the USB 2.0 Extension descriptor This descriptor is documented in section 9.6.2.1 of the USB 3.0 specification. All multiple-byte fields are represented in host-endian format.

files.Title: LibUsbDotNet.Version
files.Summary: Structure providing the version of the libusb runtime
